sign_in.title: Welcome
sign_in.description: Enter your email and password to access your account

defaults.error: Unable to complete sign-in right now.

http_status.400: Please review the information and try again.
http_status.409: Sign-in request conflict. Please try again.
http_status.429: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

defaults.success: Recovery instructions sent if the account exists.
defaults.error: Unable to process password recovery right now.

http_status.200: Recovery instructions sent if the account exists.
http_status.400: Please review the information and try again.
http_status.401: Recovery request could not be completed.
http_status.409: Recovery request conflict. Please try again.
http_status.429: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

defaults.error: Unable to validate the code right now.

http_status.400: Please enter a valid code and try again.
http_status.409: Verification request conflict. Please try again.
http_status.429: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

defaults.error: Unable to reset password right now.

http_status.400: Please review the information and try again.
http_status.401: Password reset could not be completed.
http_status.409: Reset request conflict. Please try again.
http_status.429: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password?
forgot_password.description: Enter your email to receive recovery instructions

verify_otp.title: Verify Code
verify_otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.description: Create a new secure password for your account
